# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

We are committed to making participation in this project a welcoming and respectful experience for everyone, regardless of age, body size, disability, ethnicity, gender identity and expression, level of experience, nationality, personal appearance, race, religion, or sexual identity and orientation.

## Our Standards

**Expected behavior:**

- Be respectful and constructive in all interactions
- Welcome newcomers and help them get started
- Accept constructive criticism gracefully
- Focus on what is best for the community and the project

**Unacceptable behavior:**

- Harassment, trolling, or personal attacks
- Publishing others' private information without consent
- Sharing or soliciting real patient data in issues, discussions, or PRs
- Any conduct that could reasonably be considered inappropriate in a professional setting

## Medical Data Warning

This project deals with medical information. **Never share real patient data** (names, images, reports) in any public channel — issues, pull requests, discussions, or comments. Use anonymized or synthetic data only.

## Enforcement

Instances of unacceptable behavior may be reported by opening a private advisory or contacting the maintainers. All complaints will be reviewed and investigated promptly.

## Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/), version 2.1.
